rationale: Wrap in `if (full antecedent) { ... }` so the per-run `=~=` ensures and `.wf()`s become hypotheses inside the branch; materialize both `=~=` on the shared `target = pre.seq@.update(i, out)`, do a pointwise `assert forall|j| ... by { ... }` case (both views equal `target[j]`), lift through Seq ext-equality, Ghost-wrapping, and the inline `view` to expose every projection (`.seq`, `.seq@`, `.@`) z3 may need. Broadcast `vstd::array::group_array_axioms` so `lemma_array_index` and `axiom_array_ext_equal` are in scope for any `[A; N]`-level reasoning the synthetic `det_set_equal` reduces to; `r1 == r2` closes the unit-return obligation.
